calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2003 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2003 Continued To Mar-24-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Janet Brayer, Esq. (415)281-8888, for plaintiffs Personality Hotels,Inc. and Frank Lembi
Tina Bantay, agent for Personality Hotels, Inc.
Tina Bantay is sworn and examined. After hearing the declatory evidence the court grants the the judgment in favor of the plaintiffs, and against the defendant, Debra Maloney as follows: Principal:$132,927.81; Interest: $12,770.35; Attorneys Fees: $875.00; Costs: $660.00 for a total judgment of $147,236.16. The prevailing party is to prepare and submit a judgment for signature.
Commissioner: Loretta Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter: June Leathey, CSR # 1629

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2002 Continued To Feb-10-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 2/10/2003 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: La Von Granger. (212)
